consistency.casting_time_and_range: Consistent. 1 action casting time and 60 feet range are typical for this utility spell.
consistency.components: Consistent. V (Verbal) component fits the noisy nature of the spell.
consistency.duration: Consistent. Instantaneous duration is appropriate for a one-time effect.

quality.description_clarity: High quality. The description clearly outlines the targets (doors, boxes, locks) and the effect (unlocking, unbarring).
quality.mechanical_completeness: Mechanically complete. It specifies handling multiple locks (only one affected) and the specific interaction with *Arcane Lock*.
quality.flavor_integration: Good. The loud knock audible up to 300 feet reinforces the non-subtle nature of the spell.

mechanics.primary_effect: Opens one mundane lock, unbars, or unsticks a non-magical barrier instantly.
mechanics.secondary_effect: Suppresses *Arcane Lock* for 10 minutes, allowing normal opening/closing.
mechanics.limitations: Only affects one lock if multiple exist. Does not bypass physical barriers like solid walls.
mechanics.interaction_notes: The 10-minute suppression window for *Arcane Lock* is a critical mechanical interaction point.
